deployTxNote: Not recorded at deploy time and not recoverable afterwards: no deploy artifact was written, and the Bradbury explorer exposes no public API for contract-creation lookup. Record this field on the next deployment.
consumedBy: frontend/src/lib/clients.ts (CONTRACT_ADDRESS — the frontend reads the address from there, not from this file)

superseded.note: An earlier TaskEscrow deployment, still live on Bradbury with its own separate task state and the same treasury. It survives only in stale frontend/.next build output and in pre-2026-07-09 notes. It is NOT the contract the deployed app calls.

verification: frontend/src/lib/clients.ts commits this address at HEAD, with no local modification.
All 12 JS chunks served by the live Vercel deployment were fetched; this address appears in chunk 3z1lecdmcv0m1.js and the superseded address appears zero times.
eth_getCode cannot distinguish the two addresses — both return byte-identical proxy bytecode. Distinguishing them requires calling the contract views.

get_task(3) on this address returns the RESOLVED lullaby dispute whose verdict text matches the quote in README.md and the screenshot in readme-assets/profile-verdict.jpg verbatim. The superseded address holds a different lullaby task with different verdict reasoning.
